texts.label: text
texts.orig: Room Rates for 2025 Exchange Rate: $1USD = 125KES (Rates in KES*)
texts.text: Room Rates for 2025 Exchange Rate: $1USD = 125KES (Rates in KES*)

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Should the Government of Kenya institute a new tax regime during the pendency of this agreement, the resort reserves the right to renegotiate the rates contained in the agreement accordingly.
texts.text: Should the Government of Kenya institute a new tax regime during the pendency of this agreement, the resort reserves the right to renegotiate the rates contained in the agreement accordingly.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: TERMS AND CONDITIONS
texts.text: TERMS AND CONDITIONS

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Child Policy
texts.text: Child Policy

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Child sharing (6 -12 years old) Maximum 1 child with 2 adults: As per rate grid
texts.text: Child sharing (6 -12 years old) Maximum 1 child with 2 adults: As per rate grid

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Child sharing (6 -12 years old) Maximum 1 child with 1 adults = Double Room rate
texts.text: Child sharing (6 -12 years old) Maximum 1 child with 1 adults = Double Room rate

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 0-5 years old sharing (maximum 2 children): FREE
texts.text: 0-5 years old sharing (maximum 2 children): FREE

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 6-12 years old in own room (max. 2 children) -75% of adult double rate
texts.text: 6-12 years old in own room (max. 2 children) -75% of adult double rate

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 12 years old and above = full adult rate
texts.text: 12 years old and above = full adult rate

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Cancellation Policy
texts.text: Cancellation Policy

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · All booking cancellations must be advised in writing to the reservations team: rsv@dianireef.com.
texts.text: All booking cancellations must be advised in writing to the reservations team: rsv@dianireef.com.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · No refund will be issued for any cancellation made within 7 days before the check-in date.
texts.text: No refund will be issued for any cancellation made within 7 days before the check-in date.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · A 50% refund will be issued if cancellation is made between 8-30 days before check in date.
texts.text: A 50% refund will be issued if cancellation is made between 8-30 days before check in date.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · A full refund for cancellation effected 31 days and above before check-in date.
texts.text: A full refund for cancellation effected 31 days and above before check-in date.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · During festive season, any cancellation made within 31 days of arrival will incur 100% charge of the entire booking.
texts.text: During festive season, any cancellation made within 31 days of arrival will incur 100% charge of the entire booking.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Minimum Stay
texts.text: Minimum Stay

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Required minimum stay of 3 nights during festive season.
texts.text: Required minimum stay of 3 nights during festive season.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Check out will not be permitted on 24th and 31st Dec 2025.
texts.text: Check out will not be permitted on 24th and 31st Dec 2025.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Payment Policy
texts.text: Payment Policy

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · The payment must be received 7 days prior the arrival/check-in date.
texts.text: The payment must be received 7 days prior the arrival/check-in date.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Bookings not secured by the appropriate deposit will be released automatically and without prior notification.
texts.text: Bookings not secured by the appropriate deposit will be released automatically and without prior notification.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · All payments made by cheque must be cleared before the arrival/check-in date. In the event, a cheque is returned by the bank as "unpaid" for any reason the agent shall replace the payment by cash and additionally agrees to pay the returned cheque fee thereof.
texts.text: All payments made by cheque must be cleared before the arrival/check-in date. In the event, a cheque is returned by the bank as "unpaid" for any reason the agent shall replace the payment by cash and additionally agrees to pay the returned cheque fee thereof.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · The agent agrees to pay any costs, including legal fees, court costs, and any other expenses incurred by Diani Reef Beach Resort in the collection of unpaid invoices, returned cheques, or default payment.
texts.text: The agent agrees to pay any costs, including legal fees, court costs, and any other expenses incurred by Diani Reef Beach Resort in the collection of unpaid invoices, returned cheques, or default payment.
